series_metadata.series_title: GENERAL CORRESPONDENCE-JAMES A. RHODES STATE OFFICE TOWER
series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence, including reports and memorand, etc., relating to the operation and construction of the James A. Rhodes State Office Tower.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in operating area while project is under construction or current calendar year, 1 additional calendar year while in operation. in Storage determined of no value
